title: Metered subscription with entitlements
description: Learn how to create a usage-based subscription with metering and entitlements to manage customer feature access.

nodes.title: Create a meter
nodes.description: Create a meter to track AI token usage for your customers.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Create a usage-based product
nodes.description: Create a product that will be billed based on usage.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Create a metered price
nodes.description: Create a price that charges $0.004 per 1,000 AI tokens used, billed monthly.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Create a feature for the usage plan
nodes.description: Create a feature that will be included with the usage-based product.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Attach the feature to the product
nodes.description: Connect the usage feature to the usage-based product so subscribers will have access to this feature.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Create a test clock
nodes.description: Run this test helper to create a test clock to control time in your test environment.
nodes.review_prompt: Run the helper flow and confirm it advances test state without adding helper-only parameters to application code.

nodes.title: Create a customer
nodes.description: Run this test helper to create a customer for the test blueprint and associate it with the test clock.
nodes.review_prompt: Run the helper flow and confirm it advances test state without adding helper-only parameters to application code.

nodes.title: Create a checkout session
nodes.description: Create a checkout session for the customer to subscribe to the usage-based plan.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Complete the checkout process
nodes.description: The customer completes the checkout process to subscribe to the usage-based plan. Preview the checkout form through the link below. Optionally fill in the test card information with the card number as 4242 4242 4242 4242. Use a valid future date and any three-digit CVC.
nodes.review_prompt: Open the app and confirm the user-facing flow works as described.

nodes.title: Check customer entitlements
nodes.description: Listen for the webhook event to identify when there are updates to active entitlements to provision appropriate access for the customer in your application.
nodes.review_prompt: Run the relevant Stripe CLI trigger or complete the upstream flow, then confirm the handler receives and verifies the expected event.

nodes.title: Track subscription creation
nodes.description: Listen for the webhook event to identify when a subscription is created and capture customer information.
nodes.review_prompt: Run the relevant Stripe CLI trigger or complete the upstream flow, then confirm the handler receives and verifies the expected event.

nodes.title: Report customer usage
nodes.description: Report AI token usage for the customer by sending data to the meter.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Advance time to billing date
nodes.description: Run this test helper to advance the test clock to the next billing cycle to see the invoice generated for the usage.
nodes.review_prompt: Run the helper flow and confirm it advances test state without adding helper-only parameters to application code.

nodes.title: Wait for the invoice to be created
nodes.description: Listen for the webhook event to identify when the invoice is created.
nodes.review_prompt: Run the relevant Stripe CLI trigger or complete the upstream flow, then confirm the handler receives and verifies the expected event.

nodes.title: View the invoice created
nodes.description: Use the id returned in the invoice.created event to retrieve the invoice created for the reported usage during the billing period.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Wait for test clock to be ready.
nodes.description: To ensure the test clock is done advancing check that the test clock is ready to be advanced.
nodes.review_prompt: Run the relevant Stripe CLI trigger or complete the upstream flow, then confirm the handler receives and verifies the expected event.

nodes.title: Delete the test clock
nodes.description: Run this test helper to delete the test clock to clean up test data.
nodes.review_prompt: Run the helper flow and confirm it advances test state without adding helper-only parameters to application code.
